title: senecio gramineus
intro: Senecio gramineus, also known as Blue Fleabane, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of China, Japan, and Korea. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio gramineus include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as promoting wound healing and relieving digestive problems. Senecio gramineus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
